name: MKG Money Service Business, Cash Advance Short Term Repayment Option Lender
description_short: MKG Enterprises Corp offers a marketplace of business financing options through partnership with Lendio, including term loans, lines of credit, merchant cash advances, and SBA loans for established businesses.
description_long:
MKG Enterprises Corp operates as a business lending marketplace that partners with Lendio to connect small business owners with various financing solutions. The company positions itself as a one-stop shop for business loans, welcoming all for-profit businesses regardless of industry—from traditional retail to online and home-based ventures. Founded to streamline the business loan application process, the company claims applicants can apply in less than 5 minutes through their online platform.

The company offers a diverse range of business financing products with varying loan amounts and terms. Available options include Business Lines of Credit ($1,000–$250,000), Business Credit Cards ($1,000–$500,000), Business Term Loans ($5,000–$2,000,000), SBA Loans ($50,000–$5,000,000), Accounts Receivable Lines of Credit ($5,000–$5,000,000), Merchant Cash Advances ($5,000–$2,000,000), Equipment Financing ($5,000–$5,000,000), Commercial Real Estate Financing ($250,000–$5,000,000), Invoice Factoring (up to 80% of invoice value), and E-Commerce Financing ($5,000–$10,000,000).

MKG Enterprises Corp distinguishes itself by claiming to have no restricted merchant list and actively welcoming all legitimate for-profit businesses. The partnership with Lendio suggests access to multiple lenders rather than in-house underwriting. The company operates with clear eligibility criteria: businesses must have been operating for at least 6 months, maintain an active business bank account, and the owner must have a FICO score of 550 or higher with minimum monthly revenue of $10,000. Quick application turnaround is emphasized as a key differentiator.

This company is best suited for established small business owners seeking streamlined access to multiple lending options without a lengthy application process. The clear eligibility requirements and marketplace model suggest realistic underwriting standards rather than predatory lending. However, applicants should note that actual approval, terms, and rates depend on full underwriting and lender availability, which the website adequately disclaims.
address: 4021 N Fresno St Suite 107, Fresno, CA 93726

company_info.headquarters: 4021 N Fresno St Suite 107, Fresno, CA 93726

pros: Fast application process: claims applicants can apply for a business loan in less than 5 minutes
Wide range of financing products available (9+ distinct loan types) in a single marketplace
No restricted merchant list—explicitly welcomes all legitimate for-profit businesses regardless of industry
Partnership with Lendio provides access to multiple lenders rather than single-source financing
Clear, published eligibility criteria (6+ months in business, $10K+ monthly revenue, 550+ FICO) set realistic expectations
Loan amounts range from small ($1,000 credit lines) to large ($5M+ commercial real estate)
Live chat support available on website for immediate customer assistance
cons: Minimum FICO score requirement of 550 excludes borrowers with poor credit
Minimum monthly revenue requirement of $10,000 excludes very early-stage or low-revenue businesses
Website provides no specific information about interest rates, APRs, or typical loan terms
Merchant cash advance products (which can carry high effective interest rates) are prominently offered alongside more favorable loan products
Limited transparency on approval rates, average funding times, or actual borrower experiences
best_for: Established small business owners (6+ months operating history) seeking quick access to multiple financing options
For-profit businesses in any industry needing $5,000–$2,000,000 in term financing or lines of credit
E-commerce and online businesses looking for growth capital without industry-based lending restrictions
Business owners with fair credit (550+ FICO) and consistent monthly revenue ($10K+) who need fast underwriting
diagnosis: MKG Enterprises Corp is best for established small business owners with 6+ months operating history, $10K+ monthly revenue, and 550+ FICO scores seeking fast access to diverse business financing products through a marketplace model. Main caveat: actual terms, rates, and approval depend on full underwriting; the website lacks transparency on specific APRs and typical borrower outcomes, and some products (merchant cash advances) carry notably higher effective interest rates than traditional term loans.
services: Invoice Factoring (up to 80% of invoice value)
